They thrash about involuntarily as the ReductPro takes effect, diminishing all the while. Your tails are no longer long!
A curious suction sensation fills them as they slowly disappear into your body. You no longer have any tails!
Squirting a gob of paste into both hands, you carefully massage it into your ears with your fingertips.
Abruptly, you’re hit with a moment of intense vertigo. When it passes, you realize that your ears have shrunk!
Cooing slightly, you swirl the cream into your tender areolae.
You lose yourself in the sensation for a minute. When you come back, you notice that your areolae have shrunk!
With a grimace, you extend your lengthy tongue and begin quickly applying the ReductPro with both hands, gagging at the repulsive flavor.
Unbidden, your tongue begins retracting back into your mouth. After a few moments, you try extending it back to its former length, only to find that your tongue is much shorter now!
You rub the cream into your gills, occasionally releasing an involuntary gasp.
As you finish applying the Reductpro, an intense sensation of heat permeates your gills. Gently probing with your fingers, you realize you no longer have gills!
You sigh in disappointment and throw out the empty container.
